itemListElement.reviewBody:
Hello Sir/Madam,

I am really happy and thankful tha studied in Sr.Kg of the esteemed School MLZS. I am very proud to see so many positive changes in her after taking admission in MLZS. The school has a caring and child centered education system.

I extend my special thanks to her class teacher who is so much concerned about each kid's improvement and performance. Rishna loves to go to school daily. Your play-based learning approach is amazing! Thank you for instilling this love of learning into our child. It has been such a pleasure watching her grow this year.It is clear that our child's literacy and numeracy skills have developed considerably while under your care. Thank you for helping her to develop the skills and confidence that she will carry forward into the next school year with MLZS.

We are so grateful to have you as our child's teacher. Your passion for teaching shines through in everything you do, and it has had a significant impact on her academic growth this year.

Thank you for all the love, care, and dedication that you put into teaching our child! We are beyond grateful for your guidance and support. To the best teacher—your hard work and dedication have not gone unnoticed. Words cannot capture my appreciation! Please keep up this good work forever.

Thank you so much for the management and staff.
We are really excited to see our kid's performance in future classes with MLZS.

itemReviewed.name: Mount Litera Zee School - Old Mahabalipuram Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Hi,

Overall it was a great experience and could see a gradual change in a positive way to my son.

Following are the key I would highlight.

1. His Mam and school made a good comfort to come to school without any hesitation. He was very interested  to come to school in entire year.

2. Activities conducted helped him to improve his public speaking skills which was lagging in initial

3. Way of teaching helped him to create interest in subjects and remembering the concepts.

4. It was great that a special annual day conducted for the preprimary students. It shows that management is giving importance to the growing kids which help them in the future.

Thank you so much for the care and support towards my son's learning journey. We see a lot of improvements from him. Keep up the good work.

Special thanks to mam for guiding him in great and comfort way. You both found the great way to handle my child which helped him in learning, dicipline, reading, writing and social skills.

Thanks and Regards

itemListElement.reviewBody: I can't express how grateful I am for the incredible experience my kids have had at Mount Litera Zee School, OMR, Chennai. The teachers and management are top-notch, and the staff is incredibly responsible and caring. It's heartwarming to see how much my children enjoy going to school every day. The extracurricular activities provided are outstanding, adding an extra dimension to their education. I couldn't be happier with the overall environment and the way my children are thriving here. Thank you, Mount Litera Zee School, for making their educational journey so enjoyable!

itemReviewed.name: Mount Litera Zee School - Old Mahabalipuram Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Ok, let me share my experience while trying to enroll my daughter in the 8th STD last year. I guess it's useful for parents who are trying to enroll their child here and for concen people of the school. Here is some solid feedback.

They take 1000 rupees for the assessment exam, initially they said the results will be shared with us in two days, but the results were never shared with us. So you have to follow up with them and it's parents responsibility, this is what the school later confirmed as we tried to call them and asked for an explanation.

Well I have been visiting multiple schools around the area regarding the admission that day, the experience here is one of the worst. There were parents before me who were already consulting with the representative, I waited patiently for my turn, when it was  my turn the representative totally  dismissed me and not paying attention to us at all, instead she started a side conversation with the person who is assumed to a admin
Who used to work there, she kept on hanging on us and continued her conversation in a highly unprofessional way. Eventually the other person noted me getting annoyed by her behaviour and pointed to her to take care of her business first, thanks to that good soul.

And it was of no good conversation once she gave her full attention, she kept repeating the feel structure and the dates associated with regards to the admission. Believe me it is the same experience you get when you visit the SBi bank on a Monday morning,At this point I lost interest in continuing the conversation with her, what I wanted to know was how their school is different from others and why Mount Litera should be my choice.

With this experience I would not leave my daughters future with this school.

itemReviewed.name: Mount Litera Zee School - Old Mahabalipuram Rd
